title: Upsert with on_conflict: :nothing
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.bulk_insert_users/1` that takes a list of user attribute maps and bulk-inserts them using `Repo.insert_all/3`. Duplicates on the `email` unique index should be silently ignored — use `on_conflict: :nothing` and `conflict_target: :email`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Canonical do-nothing upsert with both required options. Mechanical.
